creator: xor@davydkovo.net
text:
On Tue, 21 Feb 2012 13:31:38 +0400
  "Alexey V. Degtyarev" <alexey@renatasystems.org> wrote:
> Hello!
> 
> I could not reproduce the problem. Does the problem still occur with
> 9.0-RELEASE?

Hi!

Yes, the problem repeats on RELEASE.

It takes place only with the interface type "vlan"
(Probably not only, but on usual ifaces it is not take place).

> 
> # uname -mrsi
>FreeBSD 9.0-RELEASE amd64 XENHVM
> 
> # grep ^ucarp /etc/rc.conf
> ucarp_enable="yes"
> ucarp_addr="192.168.255.253"
> ucarp_if="xn0"
> ucarp_vhid="253"
> ucarp_src="192.168.255.254"
> ucarp_pass="somepass"
> ucarp_upscript="/usr/local/sbin/ucarp-up"
> ucarp_downscript="/usr/local/sbin/ucarp-down"
> 
> # /usr/local/etc/rc.d/ucarp start
> Starting ucarp.
> 
> /var/log/messages:
> ucarp[59867]: [WARNING] Switching to state: BACKUP
> ucarp[59867]: [WARNING] Spawning [/usr/local/sbin/ucarp-down xn0 
>192.168.255.253]
> ucarp[59867]: [WARNING] Switching to state: MASTER
> ucarp[59867]: [WARNING] Spawning [/usr/local/sbin/ucarp-up xn0 
>192.168.255.253]
> 
> # /usr/local/etc/rc.d/ucarp status
> ucarp is running as pid 59867
> 
> -- 
> Alexey V. Degtyarev
